aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Advantage Air due to missing schema markup and lack of conversational content, but quick fixes can improve visibility.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings and complete information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product or Service schema for offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI crawlers.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Long Beach and surrounding areas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by adding detailed HowTo guides and publishing regular content on industry trends.

agency_pitch.hook: Dominate AI search results with our AEO expertise.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Losing 40% of potential leads as AI assistants overlook their site.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or FAQ content detected, despite high GBP ratings.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance site with schema markup, add conversational content, and optimize for AI search to boost visibility and lead generation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI will capture market share if action is delayed.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your HVAC Business Deserves Better Visibility
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas where AI search optimization can elevate your HVAC business.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business stand out to AI assistants and capture more leads.
